No Poverty.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives supports a connection to poverty eradication.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives supports a connection to hunger or food security.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The course explicitly covers 'atypical development' and 'Neurodevelopmental disorders,' directly aligning with Target 3.4's focus on promoting mental health and well-being.
evidence: models of typical and atypical development

Quality Education.reason: The course title 'Developmental Psychology and Learning in Young Children' and topics like 'Language acquisition' directly address Target 4.2 on quality early childhood development and education.
evidence: Developmental Psychology and Learning in Young Children
